qa_pairs.question: How can Docker instantiate images directly from CVMFS?
qa_pairs.answer: Docker can instantiate images directly from CVMFS by using the graph driver plugin.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find additional documentation for the WLCG unpacked repository project?
qa_pairs.answer: Additional documentation for this project is available at https://github.com/cvmfs/ducc.

qa_pairs.question: Where is the list of automatically published images for the WLCG unpacked repository located?
qa_pairs.answer: The list of automatically published images is located at https://gitlab.cern.ch/unpacked/sync/blob/master/recipe.yaml.

qa_pairs.question: What is an example of an image included in the automatically published list?
qa_pairs.answer: The atlas-grid-centos7 image is included in the automatically published list.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user add an image to the list of automatically published images for the WLCG unpacked repository?
qa_pairs.answer: To add an image to the list, a user can submit a merge request.
